revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410164509|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=FULLBASEPAGENAME%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{high-use}} Get the namespace and the base page name of a page. It is similar to the magic word {{tl|FULLROOTPAGENAME}}, but returns the '''parent''' of the page hierarchy instead of the '''root'''. It is basically equivalent to using the magic word {{NAMESPACE}}:{{BASEPAGENAME}}. == Usage == * {{tlx|FULLBASEPAGENAME}} → {{FULLBASEPAGENAME}} * {{tlx|FULLBASEPAGENAME|Template:1x/sandbox}} → {{FULLBASEPAGENAME|Template:1x/sandbox}} * {{tlx|FULLBASEPAGENAME|Wikipedia:Administrators' noticeboard/Arbitration enforcement/Archive1}} → {{FULLBASEPAGENAME|Wikipedia:Administrators' noticeboard/Arbitration enforcement/Archive1}} In namespaces with subpages disabled, it will return the full page name: * {{tlx|FULLBASEPAGENAME|List of 28 Days/Weeks Later characters}} → {{FULLBASEPAGENAME|List of 28 Days/Weeks Later characters}} Note that this template can be substituted. == See also == * [[mw:Help:Magic words#Page names]] * {{tl|FULLROOTPAGENAME}} * {{tl|ROOTPAGENAME}} {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Wikipedia magic word templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{high-use}} Get the namespace and the base page name of a page. It is similar to the magic word {{tl|FULLROOTPAGENAME}}, but returns the '''parent''' of the page hierarchy instead of the '''root'''. It is basically equivalent to using the magic word {{NAMESPACE}}:{{BASEPAGENAME}}. == Usage == * {{tlx|FULLBASEPAGENAME}} → {{FULLBASEPAGENAME}} * {{tlx|FULLBASEPAGENAME|Template:1x/sandbox}} → {{FULLBASEPAGENAME|Template:1x/sandbox}} * {{tlx|FULLBASEPAGENAME|Wikipedia:Administrators' noticeboard/Arbitration enforcement/Archive1}} → {{FULLBASEPAGENAME|Wikipedia:Administrators' noticeboard/Arbitration enforcement/Archive1}} In namespaces with subpages disabled, it will return the full page name: * {{tlx|FULLBASEPAGENAME|List of 28 Days/Weeks Later characters}} → {{FULLBASEPAGENAME|List of 28 Days/Weeks Later characters}} Note that this template can be substituted. == See also == * [[mw:Help:Magic words#Page names]] * {{tl|FULLROOTPAGENAME}} * {{tl|ROOTPAGENAME}} {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Wikipedia magic word templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
